name: touchstone
description: Plugins published alongside the Touchstone component library — scaffolding, codemods, and integration helpers for consumers of @4lt7ab/touchstone.

plugins.name: scaffold-touchstone-app
plugins.description: Scaffold a Touchstone-shaped React application — Vite + React + @4lt7ab/touchstone, the full AppShell envelope, twelve themes, five real pages, mocked data. The workshop walks the apprentice in.
